case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. VS. HING F. HO et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-30-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT HO, HING F. DOES 1 THRU 5, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-07-2013
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT HO, HING F.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $459.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT HO, HING F.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 5, INCL.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-30-2013 CONTINUED TO JUL-30-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE APR-30-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION WAIVING ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HO, HING F. $10,760.20 PRINCIPAL, $459.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,219.20, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-30-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT CCP 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 1033(B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $427.51 INTEREST, $88.24 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ORDER ADMITTING COPIES INTO EVIDENCE IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS (EVID CODE 1521(A), EVID. CODE 1550) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT HO, HING F.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. SERVED JAN-17-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HO, HING F.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HO, HING F.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $11,856.76 AS TO DEFENDANT HO, HING F.
